review_text: Dovendo partire molto presto abbiamo prenotato in questo posto dove ci sono varie casette con balconcino dove puoi rilassarti in attesa di cucinare. Vicino alla reception c'era una bella piscina che volevo usare ma ho dovuto accompagnare un compagno per vedere dove si prendeva il pulmaan in quanto la mattina presto doveva andare ad Ailie Beack.

We were staying on a campsite opposite the river. It was very pretty watching the sun go down however beware there are lots of mosquitoes! We went to bed early to avoid them. The bathrooms are okay, outdated but reasonably clean. However the park is near the main roads so you get a lot of traffic noise. We had a terrible sleep as there was a loud noise going all night across the river like an angle grinder or something. It went on for hours while we were trying to fall asleep and then started up again at 3am! Not the parks fault obviously, just something to be aware of - lots of noise & light pollution
Great place to stay, amenities and gardens cleans, close to cbd, just alittle pricey for a night for powered site

Travelling towards Rockhampton wanted approx 4 day stay so tried this park, with 2 emails and 3 phone calls we gave up .
What happened to someone being polite and answering phones
Seemed a very nice park to stay,but we will never know.😡
Was not help full at all very unprofessional
Terrible toilet block stinks and yuk
We stayed in a cabin here last night and found it to be just great in all ways, and at a fantastic price. High ceiling, comfy lounge and bed, fans and aircon
Thank you, was clean, spacious

Terrible amenities block. So outdated and filthy!
Camp kitchen also dirty and run down and have to pay to use bbq. The games room was creepy. Close proximity to town but not worth the value. Very depressing vibe.
Very nice cabins at a good price in convenient  location close to all amenities...
Staff friendly.  Cabin clean and quiet surroundings

This tourist park is cheap and cheerful. The cabin was pretty small and fairly dated but it was an ok place to stay for a night. There was a parking space outside the cabin although it was pretty tight which could be an issue if you had a very large car.

The guys at Riverside tourist Park were amazing, super friendly and an absolute blessing! The cabin we stayed in was well maintained, sound resistant (couldn't hear any of the noise from the overpass close by). AC in the cabin kept the entire place cool and comfortable. Beds were comfy, felt like a cloud and linen provided was clean, and smelt fresh. Water pressure in the shower was astounding, especially after such a long drive. The other facilities were also well kept, albeit only being able to check out the pool, they also offer a laundry, with well priced washing machines and dryers. Excellent place to stay with the family, or just a stop over if heading North/South. Highly recommended!
A Little TLC  would be nice.
Excellent place to stay
Good internet, ample cooking and utensils on hand. Good pool.
Book the camping area here, the staff was so nice and helpful. Toilet and shower was okay, not too dirty but still clean

We arrived at the last minute and the lady in the  office was great, Service was great, our site is Lovely, we were so hot and tired and she was very patient with us. A Great Big 👍. Also a 5 Star rating from us. Great place to be. Thankyou 🥰
Pleasant park

This is the first caravan park with a coin-operated BBQ I have seen in Australia. Also, the water from the BBQ shelter was muddy. The camp was infested with sandflies, and the campground had an unpleasant odour. It is probably not suitable for tent camping.

Prima camping, wij stonden aan de rivier onder een mooie boom. Genoeg schaduw.
Toiletten zijn schoon, grote wasgelegenheid en zelfs grote ophangmolens.
Mooi park in de buurt.

Arrived in Rockhampton late afternoon and the lady at reception was very lovely.  Gave us a site in the shade and very close to the amenities, which was great because we had heaps of washing to do.  After asking, she recommended the Critirion Hotel for a good steak, and we were very impressed.  Dinner was fabulous. We walked from the caravan park, across the bridge, to the Hotel.  Short walk. Fabulous location.

We're used to looking for isolated free camps when we're camping. It's about how you choose to experience the locations that you visit so facilities that are a little dated don't bother us that much. Riverside is well placed but it's not glamorous if that's your preference. There is full facilities that were clean and abundant. The office has essentials and ice. River access in the park if you want to fish is next to zero but there are options close to the park. Park manager was very helpful and pleasant.
Our room upgraded and we had a good time. Thank you so much
Close to the town centre and all its amenities, everything is in good order, however, the mosquitos are dreadful. We wouldn't go again because of this.
Toilet blocks need desperate upgrade.
A bit dated but had an excellent position for our visit
good voor a quick night and a stroll into town. otherwise, small spots, noisy city.

Classic style park and a good price per site. The camp kitchen can certainly do with a makeover, but the amenities were always clean (which is important).

Will definitely stay here again!

Not impressed with the cabin we stayed in.
E14, had trouble opening the door. Hot water tap dripped, saw the girl at the front desk & the guy came and turned the rap off really hard. Of course when we turned it on it dripped even more!
Mattress uncomfortable & pillows were like pancakes. Only one teaspoon & very little cups and plates. Old hot plate had to lift out of the cupboard to cook on!
Bathroom had rot around the bottom!
Unfortunately had 6 horrible nights there as our car was being fixed.
Was worth about $60, certainly not $160!

The cabin was difficult to get in to as the door stuck. The flyscreen couldn't be locked. The front curtain had partly come off the rod. The bed was crammed in the front area when there was a perfectly good back bedroom area. Only seating for two, so no point in having the second bed. A table and chairs could have been placed in the living area. Only one chair on the balcony. Decor very tired.
Spacious cabin. Comfortable. Good value.
Quiet caravan park

Have stayed on a powered sites in this park 3 or 4 times in the last 10 years. The bride and I really like it. It's a no frills park in a good location. The facilities are nothing to write home about, however they are always clean and tidy.
Caravan park on the river and close to shops. The sites are small. Amenities are clean with good hot water.
Had a "Detention Centre" vibe. Lots of road noise and a super tight space for the van. Could not put awning out. Ok, for an overnight stop. However, I would not visit again.
No late check ins. Reception lacking social skills , very unprofessional. Ended up finding alternative accommodation and glad that we did.

Great value for money. Friendly lady on the front desk. Amenities were central to all camp spots. Toilets and showers always clean. Showers - so much space to put your stuff and nice hot water! Camp kitchen was compact but had everything you would want. Take ear plugs and you won’t hear the traffic noise we slept well. Would recommend!
Not a bad park, clean and handy for Rocky but a lot of traffic noise at night.
No issues, enjoyed our stay.
Lovely location, well maintained facilities and friendly staff, excellent value for money.

I cannot comment on rooms or service.
I have a motorhome & site was amazing.
Amenities are old but very clean.
Cheap $42 per nite great location.
I'll be back...

Great location can walk into Rockhampton town and pubs.
Fruit market 5 minutes away.
Sites are tight in some cases and feel people need to be told about the black hose indicators.
Saw two lots of campers
" squashed" by big caravans.
Amenities are clean but old.Hot showers so I'm happy.
Good laundry facilities.
It is noisy with the bridge nearby ...no problem for us.
Very reasonable for the location in a city.
Very outdated park and amenities.  For $41/night, no value for money😔
Been stuck up here for over a month and I was here til my car was fixed, this caravan park including the staff was amazing, I will be back met some great ppl here as well
Tight campsites right on top of each other, amenities very average
Close to town. Clean but old amenities. Sites not particularly level. Fine for a day or two.

Don't pay anything in advance,  due to urgent medical issue, un able to make the booked date, one night only, asked if we could change for another date but was refused.  Told their policy is changes must be made 48hrs in advance and we tried to comply but they don't answer their phone.  Go else where.  Definitely won't even look going there again.
Only an overnighter for work, but nice spacious cabin, great shower. Suited me
This park must be making a killing from the dozens of identical vans lined up set to serve work crews. Pity that some of the profit was not invested in upkeep of the internal road surfaces.

Rang to make a booking here.
We asked a question that needed a confirmation and was told we would get a call back. I'm still waiting for the call. We went elsewhere and so glad we did.

Nur 3 Sterne weil die Atmosphäre durch die hohen Bäume sehr angenehm ist, was sehr wichtig ist. Die Anlage ist sehr alt und in keinem guten Zustand. Die Mülleimer im Bad wurden in den 36h auch nicht geleert... Für Selbstversorger sicher ganz nett. Für den Preis unangemessen.
It's cheap - for a reason.
Not bad.

Cabins were cosy.Staff were great. Had kitchen. Good price.

A lot of midges or sandflies only downfall. Near river.

First up staff refused us an unpowered site even though it is advertised. We have solar power. Gave us a site directly outside the toilet , which was lit up better than a football stadium all night. There was no need for this as the park had about six guests and a heap of space we could have used. Ok The mossies had massed in all the water in drains and gully traps around. Bathrooms were filthy. Camp kitchen had no plugs for washing up and was dirty and uncared for.  No rest here  from the highway noise either. Won't be back

Located beside the river and walking distance to the city via bridges. My room was a fully set up bungalow with cooking facilities. It was comfortable and clean. The staff were friendly and helpful. I would stay here again.

This park had plenty of room in Oct,  it's on the bank of the muddy brown Fitzroy River. U can walk to shops, but remember it's hot weather. Not a great place if you want to sleep, lots of sirens day and night, seriously bad screeching Galahs and constant lorikeets chatter. Amenities were clean.
Great place to stay reasonable prices good service

Park is in need of a renovation. The powered sites are very tight and the concrete slabs are old and cracked. Lots of ants and sand flys. Prepare to get attacked!!
Toilets facilities are dirty. They do not deep clean the toilets and go over the same spots every day. They need attention badly. The feeling you get from the park is that the owners have lost interest. No activities planned for people staying,the games room up stairs has magazines from 2017. It smells like something not cleaned in a long time. Not inviting at all. It's a shame as it could be a fantastic park if some love was put into it.
Laundry area needs attention, also the signs are misleading it states $1 for 8 or so mins but you need to put $6 in for it to work!!
Doesn't help anyone in long term short term accommodation so pretty pointless
Loved all the trees and very private would stay there again
All perfect for everything
Yet another great Experience while I stayed at the Riverside Caravan Park. Nice grounds, clean amenities and Friendly Service. Nice central location.
Staying on power site very nice place great management loving it as allways
Great Park close to town and affordable

Hi, we never made it to this park. Had booked in for 12th august and told would have to pay for the one night in advance which we did. Rain was suppose to start on Sunday and big rain Monday Tuesday. Because of this we went inland away from the rain and continue our trip home as couldn’t wait around for the big rain totals to clear up. I rung and explained this to the owner as we didn’t want to be caught up in rain and then maybe floods to get out. He would not refund the money and just said it’s not raining here now which was the Sunday. Very disappointed and will not be going to that park next time up. One lesson learnt is do not pay ahead of time and that payment was in full.

We river fishing but many sea weed
Cancel fishing

Although we understand people live in caravan parks, we did not expect them to be swearing and drunk, arguing with each other. This is the first time we have felt unsafe in a park. |Two nights here, a family wedding to attend... or we would have left.|The dump site was right in front of a camp site and pretty unkempt. |Would not recommend
Great location plenty sites and managers very helpful
Great site

Sehr toller Campingplatz und das Personal ist sehr freundlich.
Das Bad war sehr sauber und bei den Duschen hat man warm Wasser.
Convenient for overnight. But aircon didn't seem to heat. Probably not a problem usually but with an overnight of 6 it was pretty cold in our cabin!
Great place, pet friendly, cheap.

We arrived at Riverside around 4pm. I didn't find the reception staff overly friendly or helpful. I was told the park was accessible to come and go at any stage as it was not locked and how to get to our villa. We had a 2 room villa. The main area had a queen bed, kitchenette, dining table for two and a two person couch. The kitchenette had a hot plate, microwave, kettle, toaster, mini-fridge, sink and cutlery and crockery. The bedroom had a set of bunks (2 single beds) which our children thought were a bit rackety. The shower was hot, but the bathroom was a bit pokey. The park was as you would expect - on the river and my husband and one of our children had attempted to fish, however the tide didn't allow this to happen. It was a quiet and comfortable room. The balcony had a table and two chairs and was surrounded by a tropical feeling garden. I think it would be a good idea to use bug repellent if exploring the park at night. We would consider staying here again.
It's quite, clean, functional and old. Great spot on the river and walking distance to centre of town, farmers markets, cheap diesel and liquor store. $40 with Power and water, what else do you need.
Great location within walking distance to some shops and eateries
A great little caravan park on the middle of Rocky! Easy walk to restaurants and a good pub with excellent food

We arrived office closed, came back 30 mins later! Put us on dirt  although there were grassed areas and it was raining hence mud!|Rang the office a couple of times no answer|Toilet block needs refurbishing but the shower was good!|Wouldn't go again
Is a very noisy spot along side the busy Fitzroy bridge/road

A pleasant overnight stay a few days ago.
Good little park, great customer Service and directions to the park. Lots of information on arrival regarding the park and surrounding area.
Nice location .
Amenities clean and tidy.
Thank you
Nice tropical looking sites, all close to the river, clean amenities,  and laundry. Has a pool,  Staff are nice.
Not helpful so rude I can not be leave his even a maneger
No internet so try to watch TV. Lucky to hhet 3 channels and not  you would like. Roaches, wet/damp smelling cabin. Shocking all round.

Reasonable priced and decent enough amenities, given the location we encountered some dodgy characters in the park during our overnight stay. If you need a quick overnight stay in rocky this caravan park is sound.
Old and outdated,plenty of midges,very dry grasses and the gamesroom is very dirty,but close to shop and near the river
Spent a night in a shonky hotel, found this tourist park- villa is beautiful, comfortable, cosy and pet friendly. Lovely managers and staff.
Lovely by the river. Great spot
Handy to town right on the river wifi signal week.
Nice place on the river. Close, easy access to shops and kershaw gardens. Amenities were fair.

What's with no late arrrivals?

A big accident on the highway prevented arrival before the 5.45pm closing time.  Unfortunately "We don't do late / after hour arrivals" prevented us staying on what is a well located little park.

Come on management - better service = more customers.........
This is a great park to stay at. Our cabin was very clean. The pool was nice and clean.
Great stopover when travelling with a dog. Very friendly.
De nombreuses attentions, à mi-chemin entre l'hôtel et le camping, j'ai beaucoup aimé mon séjour ici
Amenities so clean lovely hot showers

Stayed 1 night arrived late and manager was really helpful and sorted us a riverside campsite. Amenities were slightly outdated but nice and clean. Can see river from campsites. Nice place to stay on the way through Rockhampton. 15 minute walk to pubs and restraunts
Nice little park,borders the Fitzroy River,good cabins,not to far to the shops
Great location near the historic part of Rockhampton. Plenty to do and a good launch place for day trips. The midgees got me one afternoon though so I got itchybititis
Nice location near the river and close to town. Good facilities - pathway to amenities, pool and plenty of trees.

We stayed one night in a Standard Villa. The park was in a good location for walking to the CBD and the shops and restaurants. The cabin was oldish, but was clean, well maintained and with all the necessary items for self catering. The bed was comfortable. A good size TV with Foxtel available. The park was in a quiet location. The lady at reception was very helpful.
Could not fault this park for its overall value
Excellent location. Some sites extremely narrow and tight. Good size amenities and plenty of hot water
Set on the banks of the fitzroy river across from the cbd of Rockhampton close to shops and attractions $38.00 a nite as of 10/8/23
Got a sunset across the river.

Stayed in our caravan here as we needed work on our 4wd the owner just let us stay day today as we really didn't know when it would be ready they were very helpful. Nice park had a lovely shady spot clean facilities and a pool. River at back of park so quite scenic.
Walking distance to city centre. Cheap accommodation great value. 👍

Good little caravan Park, at $38 per night it is very affordable.
Right in the middle of town close to all shopping centres.
Toilets and laundry are old but clean, showers have good pressure.
A bit of road noise but nothing that I would complain about.
Basic camp kitchen with everything you need for a cook up.
I would stay here again, staff are nice and helpful.

We have stayed several times. Aging but OK. The site we have this time is just too small. Surely there should be room for a caravan, its awning and the tow vehicle. We will have to remember to ask for a decent sized site if we return.🙄
Tried to secure a long-term spot but none going. No permanents . Beautiful spot.
